title: Tom’s Dream
description: Tom teaches Franky and Iceburg that a shipwright must stand proudly behind the ships they build.
scene: Across pages 2, 3, 4, 5, this part follows Franky, Iceburg, Tom, Spandam, Kokoro. Tom teaches Franky and Iceburg that a shipwright must stand proudly behind the ships they build.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Grandma! Grandma! That fire's so huge ____!!

dialogue.speaker: Blueno
dialogue.text: Wasn't frankly in your bar earlier?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We have the long nose guy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You have a really crappy memory!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Fine! You do the yelling then!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Big bro is gonna kick our asses!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Come out! Come out! Straw hat!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Getting a good beating, I'm sure!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Of course! They destroyed our frankly house!

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: You're not worthy of our time...

summary: Tom teaches Franky and Iceburg that a shipwright must stand proudly behind the ships they build.
